changeSet.author: system
system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS material_supplier_links ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, material_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES materials(id), supplier_id BIGINT NOT NULL, approved_for_material BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, scope_of_approval TEXT, approval_conditions TEXT, effective_date DATE, review_date DATE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, UNIQUE(material_id, supplier_id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mat_supplier_links_material_id ON material_supplier_links(material_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS material_lots ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, material_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES materials(id), internal_lot_number VARCHAR(60) NOT NULL UNIQUE, supplier_lot_number VARCHAR(200), supplier_id BIGINT, manufacturer VARCHAR(200), manufacturer_site VARCHAR(200), country_of_origin VARCHAR(100), purchase_order_number VARCHAR(100), delivery_note_number VARCHAR(100), invoice_number VARCHAR(100), received_quantity DECIMAL(15,4) NOT NULL, accepted_quantity DECIMAL(15,4), rejected_quantity DECIMAL(15,4), remaining_quantity DECIMAL(15,4), unit_of_measure VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, date_received DATE, received_by_id BIGINT, expiry_date DATE, retest_date DATE, storage_location VARCHAR(200), lot_status VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'QUARANTINED', released_at TIMESTAMPTZ, released_by_id BIGINT, rejected_at TIMESTAMPTZ, rejected_by_id BIGINT, disposed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, disposed_by_id BIGINT, rejection_reason TEXT, hold_reason TEXT, disposal_reason TEXT, release_conditions TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_by BIGINT, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mat_lots_material_id ON material_lots(material_id); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mat_lots_lot_status ON material_lots(lot_status);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS material_receipts ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, material_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES materials(id), material_lot_id BIGINT REFERENCES material_lots(id), receipt_number VARCHAR(60) NOT NULL UNIQUE, supplier_id BIGINT, manufacturer VARCHAR(200), supplier_lot_number VARCHAR(200), purchase_order_number VARCHAR(100), delivery_note_number VARCHAR(100), invoice_number VARCHAR(100), date_received DATE NOT NULL, received_by_id BIGINT, quantity_received DECIMAL(15,4) NOT NULL, unit_of_measure VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, number_of_containers INT, container_condition VARCHAR(30), transport_condition VARCHAR(30), storage_condition_on_arrival TEXT, coa_received BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, sds_received BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, expiry_date DATE, retest_date DATE, initial_status VARCHAR(30), receipt_notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_by BIGINT ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mat_receipts_material_id ON material_receipts(material_id); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mat_receipts_lot_id ON material_receipts(material_lot_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS material_inventory_ledger ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, material_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES materials(id), material_lot_id BIGINT REFERENCES material_lots(id), transaction_type VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL, from_location VARCHAR(200), to_location VARCHAR(200), quantity_in DECIMAL(15,4), quantity_out DECIMAL(15,4), balance DECIMAL(15,4), unit_of_measure VARCHAR(20), performed_by_id BIGINT, reference_document VARCHAR(200), related_record_type VARCHAR(50), related_record_id VARCHAR(100), reason TEXT, transaction_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mat_ledger_material_id ON material_inventory_ledger(material_id); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mat_ledger_lot_id ON material_inventory_ledger(material_lot_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS material_issues ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, material_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES materials(id), material_lot_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES material_lots(id), issue_number VARCHAR(60) NOT NULL UNIQUE, quantity_requested DECIMAL(15,4), quantity_issued DECIMAL(15,4) NOT NULL, issued_to VARCHAR(30), department VARCHAR(200), batch_work_order_ref VARCHAR(200), requested_by_id BIGINT, issued_by_id BIGINT, issue_date DATE NOT NULL, purpose_of_use TEXT, usage_notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mat_issues_material_id ON material_issues(material_id); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mat_issues_lot_id ON material_issues(material_lot_id);

changeSet.author: system
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS material_quality_issue_links ( id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, material_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES materials(id), material_lot_id BIGINT REFERENCES material_lots(id), record_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, record_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, record_reference VARCHAR(200), record_title VARCHAR(400), record_status VARCHAR(100), notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), created_by BIGINT, UNIQUE(material_id, record_type, record_id) ); CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_mat_quality_links_material_id ON material_quality_issue_links(material_id);
